content.full_text:
March 1, 1991

Ms. Jeanette Turville
Legal Division
California Fair Political Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Ms. Turville:

I would appreciate an answer to the following questions:

(1) Must a candidate or a committee report on Form 490 interest earned on a campaign bank account?

(2) If so, has this been true for all periods of time from January 1, 1987 to the present?

(3) If it is not currently required that such interest be reported, but was required for some part of the time period set forth in question #2, please indicate for what time periods it was required.

Your anticipated courtesy, cooperation and attention to this matter is most appreciated.

Very truly yours,

GARY R. ODOM
Attorney at Law

GRO/rw
